subcodes.first_line: This is a mighty Tablet sent down from the Kingdom of thy Lord, the All-Knowing, the All-Informed, and in every word thereof surgeth the ocean of names [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا لوح عظیم نزل من ملکوت ربک العلیم الخبیر و فی کل کلمه تموج بحر الاسماء من
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @proclamation to kings; rulers; prominent individuals, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
